overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character moves through a media room with Samurai band posters, transitions through a graffiti-covered hallway with neon lighting, and enters a spacious modern living room with panoramic Night City views visible through floor-to-ceiling windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: media room with large display screen and hookah

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a modern media room toward a large screen displaying Samurai album artwork

entered.detail: large wall-mounted screen displaying red and pink Samurai band album covers including 'Never Fade Away' and 'Chippin' In'
tall hookah with smoke rising, sitting on a red area rug
large rectangular red rug covering the dark floor
tall black floor speaker flanking the display screen
tall black floor speaker flanking the display screen
wall with glowing neon graffiti art in blue and purple tones

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit modern media room with a large display screen showing album covers. A hookah pipe smokes gently on a red rug in the center, flanked by floor speakers. The camera moves forward through the space, passing white floor cushions and approaching a hallway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered corridor with purple neon accent lighting

events.description: exits the media room and enters a narrow hallway with graffiti-covered walls and purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down a corridor lined with graffiti and neon lights, passing cardboard boxes on the left

entered.detail: left wall covered entirely in colorful graffiti tags and street art
right wall covered in graffiti including 'EAT THE RICH' in large white letters
continuous purple neon lighting running along the base of the walls
stacked cardboard boxes sitting on the floor against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a narrow corridor where both walls are covered in dense graffiti and street art, illuminated by purple neon strip lighting along the floor. Cardboard boxes sit against the left wall. The space feels enclosed and urban, with the 'EAT THE RICH' graffiti prominent on the right wall as the camera moves forward toward a distant living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury living room with panoramic city views and modern furniture

events.description: emerges from the narrow hallway into a spacious open-concept living room with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive living room, passing modern furniture and marble steps while approaching an elevator at the far end

entered.detail: large geometric circular chandelier with multiple rings hanging from the ceiling
modern brown leather chairs and sofas arranged on a raised platform
dark marble steps with integrated lighting leading down to the seating area
floor-to-ceiling glass windows revealing the Night City skyline
nighttime cityscape with illuminated buildings and billboards visible through the windows
dark elevator door with green indicator light above it at the far end of the room
tall potted tree in a black container near the elevator

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a luxurious living room with high ceilings and a dramatic geometric chandelier. Modern leather furniture sits on a raised marble platform, while floor-to-ceiling windows on the left reveal a sprawling neon-lit cityscape at night. The camera continues forward past marble steps and a red carpet runner, approaching an elevator door at the far end of the room, flanked by a potted tree.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, intimate media room through a gritty urban corridor and into a sprawling, high-end living space. It begins by gliding past a smoking hookah and floor speakers in a dark room with a large display screen, moving steadily toward a narrow hallway entrance. As the camera enters the corridor, the environment shifts into an enclosed urban aesthetic characterized by dense graffiti and purple neon strip lighting that guides the path past stacked cardboard boxes. The scene then opens abruptly into a luxurious living room with high ceilings and a geometric chandelier, where the enclosed walls give way to floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a neon-lit cityscape. Finally, the camera moves across a raised marble platform and a red carpet runner, proceeding toward an elevator door flanked by a potted tree.
